failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch call was malformed: it omitted the required item_id and passed product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string "1656367028".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had all required information at index 2: item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028". It attempted to invoke ProductCatalogSearch with concrete arguments, but used {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and using the wrong type/value for product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError requiring string product_id and item_id. This is not a connectivity, guardrail, or unsupported-intent issue.
